name: Kaldheim

draft.notes: Land slot is a snow basic land or a common tapped dual land (dual ~5/12 of the time); two variations of each snow basic plus 10 extra common lands. If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the land. Ad card may be a double-faced placeholder (~20% placeholder).

statedRates: Foils in ~33% of boosters. Land slot common dual land 5/12 of the time.
sourceNotes: Large set of the era. Printed US, Belgium, Japan. 36 packs per box. Rare count 64 includes 11 DFC; mythic 20 includes 5 DFC.
